name: Limelight Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Healthy Choice Fat Free Cream Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine honey and water; add to crumbs. Mix well and press into a 9-inch springform pan or pie plate.
2. Soften gelatin in water; stir over low heat until dissolved, or dissolve in microwave. Stir into evaporated skim milk; chill until thickened but not set.
3. Whip the cream cheese with lime juice and rind until blended.
4. Gradually add skim milk and food coloring, mixing until smooth and blended.
5. Add sweetener to taste; fold into the evaporated milk mixture. Pour over the crust; chill until firm.
6. Serves 10 to 12.
